name: ai.callmcp/server
description: One MCP tool contract for telephony — calls, SMS, recordings, transcripts, and phone-number lifecycle — routed to any call provider (hosted, local, or bring-your-own-key) behind an identical 14-tool schema. See SPEC.md.

environment_variables.name: CALLMCP_CONFIG
environment_variables.description: Path to a callmcp.config.json file. Omit to configure entirely via env vars.

environment_variables.name: CALLMCP_DEFAULT_DRIVER
environment_variables.description: driver_id routed to when a tool call omits `driver` (e.g. kaicalls, dograh, twilio_openai).

_callmcp_notice: SCAFFOLD ONLY — pending DNS claim of ai.callmcp/* or com.kaicalls/*. Do NOT run `mcp-publisher publish` against this file until one of those namespaces is claimed and verified; the `name` field above is provisional and will change once a namespace is secured.
